headline: Is Seagate (STX) Quietly Becoming an AI Infrastructure Linchpin Through Its Mozaic Storage Strategy?
summary: In recent days, Seagate Technology Holdings has been at the center of shifting sentiment as analysts highlighted AI-driven data center storage demand and industry supply discipline, while broader semiconductor volatility and geopolitical tensions briefly pressured memory and storage names. Beyond the short-term swings, Seagate’s position as one of the last major hard drive manufacturers, its HAMR-based Mozaic technology, and recent revenue and cash flow improvements have become focal points...
